---
title: "DAGS2"
format: html
---

```{r}
Whale_Dag <- dag ('{
bb="0,0,1,1"
"Calf Presense" [pos="0.261,0.172"]
"Food Availability" [latent,pos="0.630,0.478"]
"Food Source Population" [latent,pos="0.746,0.596"]
"Human Presence" [latent,pos="0.474,0.562"]
"Ice Coverage" [latent,pos="0.742,0.435"]
"Presence of Other Whales" [latent,pos="0.190,0.412"]
Age [latent,pos="0.433,0.139"]
Behavior [pos="0.438,0.341"]
Sex [latent,pos="0.667,0.263"]
Predators [latent,pos="0.297,0.586"]
"Calf Presense" -> "Presence of Other Whales"
"Calf Presense" -> Behavior
"Calf Presense" -> Predators
"Food Availability" -> Behavior
"Food Source Population" -> "Food Availability"
"Human Presence" -> "Food Availability"
"Human Presence" -> Behavior
"Human Presence" <-> Predators
"Ice Coverage" -> "Food Availability"
"Ice Coverage" -> Behavior
"Presence of Other Whales" -> "Food Availability"
"Presence of Other Whales" -> "Human Presence"
"Presence of Other Whales" -> Behavior
"Presence of Other Whales" -> Predators
Age -> "Calf Presense"
Age -> Behavior
Sex -> "Calf Presense"
Sex -> Behavior
Predators -> Behavior
}')

plot(Whale_Dag)
```
